creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
> none5@pci0:0:21:0:	class=0x0c8000 rev=0x11 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x8086 device=0x7a4c subvendor=0x103c subdevice=0x8bb3
>     vendor     = 'Intel Corporation'
>     device     = 'Raptor Lake Serial IO I2C Host Controller'
>     class      = serial bus

That is why touchpad is broken. We need add 0x8086:0x7a4c to list of supported devices in ig4 driver
